description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironWear your FB messages on yourself in style with this tantra t-shirt and flaunt your FB-madness without much ado.
